basic_details.short_information: FSSAI Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 11 vacancies for Group B & C posts. Candidates can apply online only from 30.05.2026 to 19.06.2026 through FSSAI website fssai.gov.in

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, 12TH, M.E/M.Tech, MCA

how_to_apply: Applications for FSSAI Deputation 2026 must be submitted online first, followed by a physical hard copy through proper channel. Both steps are mandatory.
seo_tags: FSSAI Group B & C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Junior Assistant, Assistant Manager and More Posts
